home.title: UnivTrack | Attendance Tracker App
home.subtitle: A mobile-first web app designed to help students easily track their course attendance.

features.createSchedule: Easily create terms and course schedules
features.mobileTracking: Track your absences with a mobile-friendly interface
features.personalization: Customizable theme colors and mode selection

home.getStartedDescription: Sign up now to easily track your course attendance and start using the app.

login.title: Log In
login.error: Login failed. Please check your email and password.
login.genericError: An error occurred while logging in. Please try again.
login.warningTitle: Important Notice: Please disable Ad blockers!
login.warningDescription: Ad blockers may interfere with the Database connection.

register.title: Create Account
register.genericError: An error occurred during sign up. Please try again.
register.warningTitle: Important Notice: Please disable Ad blockers!
register.warningDescription: Ad blockers may interfere with the Database connection.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to reset your password. We will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: A password reset link has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
forgotPassword.genericError: An error occurred while resetting the password. Please try again.

term.name: Term Name
term.weekCountHint: Term length can be between 5 and 18 weeks (default: 14 weeks)
term.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the {name} term? This action cannot be undone and all attendance records will be deleted.

form.nameRequired: Please enter the term name and start date.
form.uniqueCourseNames: Each course name must be unique. Please do not use the same course name more than once.
form.atLeastOneCourse: You must add at least one course.

onboarding.title: Set up from scratch in 4 steps
onboarding.subtitle: Prepare your first term, add your courses, and log your first attendance. You're in full control.

createTerm.title: Create Your Term
createTerm.description: Enter the term name and start date.

addCourses.title: Add Your Courses
addCourses.description: Add course names to your weekly schedule.

logAttendance.title: Log Your First Attendance
logAttendance.description: Create your first "Attended / Absent" entry for a course.

term.notFound: Term not found or you don't have access.

bulkUpdate.title: Bulk Update
bulkUpdate.description: Are you sure you want to update the attendance status of all previous weeks (excluding holidays) for the {course} course to '{status}'?
bulkUpdate.info: New records will be created automatically for weeks that have not been marked yet.

term.bulkUpdateHint: Bulk Attendance Update! Long press on a status (Attended / Absent / Holiday) to bulk update previous weeks of the same course. New records are created automatically for unmarked weeks, while existing records are updated (holidays are preserved).
term.noClassesThisWeek: There are no classes this week.
term.warningMessage: Warning: Courses highlighted in red are at or over the absence limit.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
